1	<script setup lang="ts">
2	import { ref, nextTick, onMounted, watch } from 'vue'
3	import { useChatStore } from '@/stores/chat'
4	import ConversationList from '@/components/chat/ConversationList.vue'
5	import MessageBubble from '@/components/chat/MessageBubble.vue'
6	import { Plus, Promotion } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
7	import type { Conversation } from '@/types'
8	
9	const chatStore = useChatStore()
10	const messageInput = ref('')
11	const messageContainer = ref<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
12	const inputRef = ref<HTMLTextAreaElement | null>(null)
13	
14	onMounted(() => {
15	  chatStore.loadConversations()
16	})
17	
18	function scrollToBottom() {
19	  nextTick(() => {
20	    if (messageContainer.value) {
21	      messageContainer.value.scrollTop = messageContainer.value.scrollHeight
22	    }
23	  })
24	}
25	
26	watch(
27	  () => chatStore.messages.length,
28	  () => {
29	    scrollToBottom()
30	  },
31	)
32	
33	watch(
34	  () => chatStore.streamingContent,
35	  () => {
36	    scrollToBottom()
37	  },
38	)
39	
40	function handleSelectConversation(conv: Conversation) {
41	  chatStore.selectConversation(conv)
42	}
43	
44	function handleDeleteConversation(convId: number) {
45	  chatStore.deleteConversation(convId)
46	}
47	
48	function handleNewConversation() {
49	  chatStore.newConversation()
50	  messageInput.value = ''
